original:
textify(n||(n=(0,i.Z)(["
			You examine the bag of Kreamy Froot, noticing that the cow’s smiling mouth rises slightly. Pressing down on it transforms the candy into different shapes and colors. [silly
				|Nanomachines, son!
				|Ah, the power of edible nanomachines.
			]
			
			As you press the button, the candy cycles through the colors of the rainbow, then back to a mixed bunch. Which color would you like to eat?
			"])))
e.capitalA+e.short+" uses the bag to no effect.

textify(a||(a=(0,i.Z)([" Ripping the bag open and pulling out a piece, you eye the [var0], fruit-shaped candy before popping it in your mouth. The chewy treat tastes like [var1] and milky cream! You eat more of the yummy Kreamy Froot until the bag is empty. [var2 |[var3 |You free your [pc.breasts] from your [pc.chestCovers], excited to see how the candy will change your [pc.milkNoun]. You rub a [pc.nipple] and gently squeeze, squirting [pc.milkColor] [pc.milkNoun] onto the ground. Licking your [pc.fingers], you discover your milk is now [var5]-flavored! Your [pc.lips] curl into a smile as you toy with your [pc.breasts]. [pc.isTreated |Heat rushes to your [pc.crotch] as imaginary lips lick and suck at your [pc.milkyNipples]. You would love to have a cutie or two suckling you right now. |You can’t wait to surprise your next lover with your [pc.milkFlavor] [pc.milkNoun]. ] |A pleasant, tingly warmth washes over your [pc.breasts]. Lifting your [pc.chestCovers], you squish a [pc.nipple] between your curious [pc.fingers]; a delighted giggle escapes your [pc.lips] as [pc.milk] squirts from your teat, its color the same as the candy. You are now lactating [var5] milk! [pc.hasGenitals |A [pc.hand] sneaks into your [pc.lowerUndergarment], your thumb circling [pc.hasCock |the tip of your [pc.cock] |your [pc.clit] ]. Your free hand plays with your [pc.milkyNipple], tugging at it as it leaks [pc.milkNoun]. Pleased moans fill the air as you [pc.hasCock |jack |jill ] off to the thought of your [pc.breastsNoun] becoming big and milky. It’s not long until you come with a cry, getting [pc.isHerm |a mix of [pc.cum] and [pc.girlCum] |[pc.hasCock |[pc.cum] |[pc.girlCum] ] ] all over your [pc.fingers]. You wipe them off on your [pc.leg], sighing in satisfaction. You’re going to love being milky. ] |You pull up your [pc.chestCovers], waiting for the candy to do... something. Time passes, but your [pc.breasts] don’t feel any different. Disappointed, you put the gals away. At least the candy tasted good. (Maybe you should eat some more once you’re lactating?) ] |You lift your [pc.chestCovers] and play with your [pc.milkyNipples], but your [pc.milkNoun] seems unchanged. Maybe you should try a different flavor? ] [var4|An itch gnaws at your [pc.ears], causing them to flick about in annoyance. As your [pc.hands] scramble to scratch them, a similar sensation reaches [pc.eachTail]. Though irritating, the itchiness is thankfully brief. Wondering if there was a change, you check your face using your Codex’s camera. The candy gave the fur on your ears cow-like spots! Your fur is now [pc.furColor]!] "]))),[function(){return t.milkColors[e]},function(){return t.milkFlavors[e]},function(){return s},function(){return o?1:pc.isLactating()?0:2},function(){return n},function(){return t.choiceNames[e]}]
